headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -52.3)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 72% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 121 quotes and exceptionally high strong intensity (101 strong vs just 16 moderate) - people are expressing anger very forcefully today.

• At 68.2, frustration levels remain well above typical range though down from yesterday's peak of 90.9.

• Optimism rebounded significantly from yesterday's negative territory to 4.4, while fears dropped deeper below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
